commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] The remaining blocker is maintainer product/security-boundary approval for a new built-in provider, not a narrow repair that automation should decide.; Cleared: No concrete supply-chain or secret-handling defect was found in the diff; the remaining security concern is the intentional new Docker Sandbox trust boundary. (sha=d9656534a50f19bff0023b8bc115753db7ddf907)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a built-in Docker Sandbox delegated-run provider backed by the standalone `sbx` CLI, including config, flags, provider registration, docs, tests, and a live smoke script.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR adds a new provider rather than reporting broken existing behavior. The PR body provides live after-change output for the new provider path.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining blocker is maintainer product/security-boundary approval for a new built-in provider, not a narrow repair that automation should decide.

target.title: feat: add Docker Sandbox provider
target.body:
## Summary

- Add a provider-neutral `docker-sandbox` delegated-run provider backed by the Docker Sandbox `sbx` CLI.
- Wire provider config, CLI flags, provider registration, docs, provider discovery metadata, and a live smoke script.
- Add focused Go tests covering config parsing, provider registration, run/session behavior, command construction, status/stop/doctor flows, error guidance, flags, and mutation-sensitive edge cases.

## Verification

- `git diff --check`
- `go vet ./...`
- `go test -count=1 ./internal/cli ./internal/providers/dockersandbox ./internal/providers/all`
- `go test -race ./...`
- `scripts/test-go-modules.sh`
- `scripts/check-go-coverage.sh 90.0` (`Go core coverage 91.0% >= 90.0%`)
- `go build -trimpath -o bin/crabbox ./cmd/crabbox`
- `bin/crabbox providers --json | rg '"name": "docker-sandbox"|"family": "docker-sandbox"|"kind": "delegated-run"|"target": "linux"|"coordinator": "never"|"run-session"|"local-container"'`
- `scripts/check-docs.sh`
- `node scripts/build-docs-site.mjs`
- `node --test scripts/*.test.js`
- `npm ci --prefix worker`
- `npm run format:check --prefix worker`
- `npm run lint --prefix worker`
- `npm run check --prefix worker`
- `npm test --prefix worker`
- `npm run build --prefix worker`
- `go run github.com/go-gremlins/gremlins/cmd/gremlins@latest unleash --diff origin/main --output <redacted temp path>`
  - Result: `Killed: 143`, `Lived: 7`, `Not covered: 1`, `Timed out: 0`, `Mutator coverage: 99.34%`.
  - Remaining survivors are boundary/equivalent-style mutants around no-op/constant/default edge guards after coordinator coverage hardening.
- `scripts/live-docker-sandbox-smoke.sh`
  - Result after Docker Sandbox setup: `classification=live_sbx_smoke_passed` with `cleanup=complete`.
  - Redacted proof: `sbx diagnose` reported `7 passed`; the smoke created a Crabbox-owned `docker-sandbox` lease, ran `echo ok`, ran `pwd`, listed the running sandbox, then stopped it and removed the local claim.
  - Local setup used for proof: `brew install docker/tap/sbx`, `sbx login`, `sbx daemon start --detach --policy balanced`.
- `~/.codex/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
  - First pass found only root `PLAN*.md` hygiene; those local plan artifacts were deleted.
  - Final pass: `autoreview clean: no accepted/actionable findings reported`.

## Notes

- Fixes https://github.com/openclaw/crabbox/issues/219.
- The provider intentionally remains delegated-run only and does not add core provider-specific routing logic.
target.author: coygeek

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
